theme: opposing trains sharing one mountain track with passing loops
title: Mountain Meet: A Rhythm for the Single Track
strategies: direction-batched baseline: run every eastbound train as one tight H-spaced pipeline, then every westbound after the line clears (checker's baseline, always feasible, very late)
earliest-due-date dispatch: sort trains by due date and insert each as early as feasible; locally sensible but scrambles the meeting phase and piles up one-sided waits

cadence pattern-then-fit: enumerate a small family of periodic meeting templates (period P, per-direction phases), snap every train onto the nearest cadence slot for its direction, keep the template with least weighted cost
phase-fit refinement: for the chosen period, sweep the two direction phases against the release grid so opposing meets land on sidings
